title.en: Having Coffee at a Coffee Shop

phrases.en: Pam and Jenny went to the coffee shop.
phrases.zh: 帕姆和珍妮去了咖啡店。

phrases.en: They ordered coffee at the counter.
And Pam ordered a muffin too.
They told the clerk they wanted to drink their coffee in the shop.
phrases.zh: 她们告诉店员想在店里喝咖啡。

phrases.en: Other customers got their drinks to go.
phrases.zh: 其他顾客把饮料打包带走。

phrases.en: Jenny paid for both of them.
The clerk punched Jenny's frequent-customer card.
phrases.zh: 店员在珍妮的常客卡上打了孔。

phrases.en: A clerk called out when Jenny's coffee was done.
phrases.zh: 珍妮的咖啡做好时，一名店员喊了一声。

phrases.en: Jenny and Pam sat down at a table.
phrases.zh: 珍妮和帕姆在一张桌子旁坐下。

phrases.en: Jenny wanted to show Pam something on the Internet.
phrases.zh: 珍妮想给帕姆看网上的一样东西。

phrases.en: So she plugged her laptop into an outlet.
phrases.zh: 于是她把笔记本电脑插到插座上。

phrases.en: The coffee shop had free Wi-Fi, so she went online.
phrases.zh: 咖啡店有免费的无线网络，于是她上了网。

phrases.en: Pam finished her cup of coffee and got a refill.
phrases.zh: 帕姆喝完了那杯咖啡，又续了一杯。

phrases.en: Pam pumped some coffee out of the container.
phrases.zh: 帕姆从咖啡桶里压出了一些咖啡。

phrases.en: When they left the shop, they put their cups on a tray for dirty dishes.
phrases.zh: 离开咖啡店时，她们把杯子放到了放脏餐具的托盘上。
